steps.name: search-quality-contract-and-query-fixture
steps.summary: Added docs/ui-vocabulary/search-discovery.md with user models, target SearchResult API, scoring fields, autocomplete candidate types, representative query fixture, match reason labels, no-result recovery, URL state contract, smoke checklist, and non-goals. Verified all 34 expected fixture ids exist in terms.yml.

steps.name: autocomplete-and-suggestion-panel
steps.summary: Added SearchAutocomplete with shadcn Popover/Command composition and a terms-driven search-suggestions lib. Suggestions include term names, aliases, category/group filters, and curated starter queries that resolve to term ids from terms.yml. Verified npm run build, npm run lint with existing shadcn warnings only, and Playwright smoke: '토' shows switch/toggle candidates, '옆에서' shows side-sheet/drawer candidates, ArrowDown+Enter selects 스위치, and 390px mobile panel stays within viewport without horizontal overflow.

steps.name: ranked-search-and-match-reasons
steps.summary: Replaced plain includes search with deterministic weighted SearchResult metadata. Results now carry score, match reasons, and matched text; cards show plain Korean reason badges without exposing scores. Added fixture boosts for purpose/appearance queries while preserving source order for empty query. Verified npm run build, npm run lint with existing shadcn warnings only, and Playwright fixture smoke: 토글, 켜고 끄는, 옆에서 나오는 창, 표 필터, 빈 화면 all surfaced expected ids near the top and default empty query order remained text-field/search-field/textarea.
